hero.headline: Handmade Luxury Gifts Crafted
hero.subheadline: Personalized bouquets, handmade keychains, premium hampers and memorable custom gifting.

bestSellersSubheading: The pieces our customers can't stop gifting.
whySubheading: Crafted with care in every petal, every stitch, every detail.

trustPoints.title: Handmade
trustPoints.description: Every piece is made entirely by hand, petal by petal, stitch by stitch.

trustPoints.title: Premium Quality
trustPoints.description: Only the finest materials — pipe cleaners, ribbons, fabrics, and packaging.

trustPoints.title: Customizable
trustPoints.description: Every gift can be tailored to tell your story, your way.

trustPoints.title: Pan India Delivery
trustPoints.description: From Mumbai to Manipur — gifts are now travelling everywhere love does.

howItWorksSubheading: Four gentle steps to a gift they will never forget.

steps.title: Choose
steps.description: Browse our collection and pick what speaks to your heart.

steps.title: Customize
steps.description: Tell us the name, date, color, or message that makes it personal.

steps.title: Confirm
steps.description: We finalize the design, confirm details, and begin crafting.

steps.title: Receive
steps.description: Your gift arrives wrapped in our signature ivory packaging.

packagingSubheading: Unboxing is part of the gift. Every parcel is an experience unto itself.
finalCtaSubheading: Your perfect gift is just one message away.
